query:
UPDATE staking_positions
            SET staked_amount     = GREATEST('0'::NUMERIC, staked_amount::NUMERIC - $2::TEXT::NUMERIC)::TEXT,
                unbonding_amount  = (unbonding_amount::NUMERIC + $2::TEXT::NUMERIC)::TEXT,
                unbonding_ends_at = $3,
                last_updated_at   = NOW()
            WHERE staker_address = $1
